title: Upon A Blear-Ey'd Woman.
content:
Wither'd with years, and bed-rid Mumma lies;
    Dry-roasted all, but raw yet in her eyes.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon A Blear-Ey'd Woman."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
